report.summary: Standup v5 ~15:00 UTC — 5 agent cycles completed since v4; clarity-act + privacy-coins LIVE (286+ pages); BTC reserve + tokenized-treasuries queued; build 1b4a15e still broken; rate limiting resolution DISPUTED by EOD-v2 (0/6 per code inspection); Sprint 58 not started; all 6 agents ran this cycle.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v4 (~14:12 UTC)
items: 📄 PUBLISHED: /learn/clarity-act-crypto-guide + /learn/privacy-coins-guide-2026 promoted via publish-v2 (14:18). Site now at 286+ pages in PUBLISHED_PAGES. Both passed full QA (H1, metadata, OG, JSON-LD, breadcrumbs — 2/2 on all checks).
📋 NEW IN QUEUE: /learn/bitcoin-strategic-reserve-guide + /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026 added from build run #8 (14:29). PUBLISH_QUEUE now has 2 items ready.

🎨 Design v5 (14:36): ARIA accessibility fixes on portfolio-tracker + notifications pages; 3 new OG images created (og-daily-challenge.svg, og-portfolio-live.svg, og-streak.svg). 4 additional OG gaps remain (xp-attestation, referral, share, notifications).

📣 Community v7 (14:50): Pectra mainnet countdown thread (9-post Twitter), crypto tax urgency tweet (March 15 Q4 deadline hook), Discord/Telegram announcements, Thursday newsletter draft. 2 SVG social cards saved to /public/. Posting schedule set: Sunday PM Pectra thread → Monday tax tweet → Tuesday privacy coins → Thursday newsletter.
🔍 GSC Organic Window: Still Day 15 (14-21 day window). First impressions data could appear any time. No organic traffic data available yet — all analytics remain projection-based.

⚠️ CRITICAL DISCREPANCY: EOD-v2 (14:56, most recent code inspection) explicitly states rate limiting is 0/6 routes — contradicting standup-v4's 'RESOLVED' claim. EOD-v2 notes: 'standup-v4 incorrectly reported rate limiting + fallback as resolved — actual file inspection contradicts this.' Carry-over status restored to OPEN.

📊 Data pipelines reported healthy by publish-v2 (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, Alternative.me all operational), but rate limiting and fallback coverage claims require re-verification via direct code inspection.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/clarity-act-crypto-guide — CLARITY Act (H.R.3633), SEC vs CFTC jurisdiction, decentralization pathway. QA 6/6.
PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/privacy-coins-guide-2026 — Monero/Zcash/Secret Network, ECC crisis, Dubai ban/MiCA regulatory landscape. QA 6/6.
QUEUED 📋 /learn/bitcoin-strategic-reserve-guide — US 325K BTC reserve, 5-country tracker, SovereignBTCTracker.tsx interactive component. Ready to publish.
QUEUED 📋 /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026 — $25.5B RWA market, BlackRock BUIDL/Ondo/Franklin Templeton, DeFi integration. Ready to publish.

OPEN 🔴 Build error 1b4a15e — 'use client' + metadata export conflict. EOD-v2 identifies /tools/sentiment-heatmap + /news/market-recap as confirmed conflict files (updated from v4's token-radar/risk-score/whale-watch list). ~15 min fix. Blocks ecosystem/courses routes from production.
OPEN 🔴 Rate limiting — DISPUTED. Standup-v4 claimed 6/6 resolved; EOD-v2 (most authoritative — direct file inspection) says 0/6. Must re-verify in next Programmer cycle before closing.
OPEN 🔴 Vercel redeploy — Production is running 75pG2jQVG (manual redeploy chain from d3bce36). Needs re-trigger once build error is fixed to serve latest committed changes.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 100/284 published slugs missing page.tsx — Sprint 59 crypto-cards cleanup removed pages still listed in published-pages.ts. Triage needed.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 JSX errors) + structured-data.examples.ts (8 JSX errors) — non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors:true) but accumulating tech debt.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 WalletConnect Project ID (NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID) — wallet auth, gamification, referral tracking all gated on this.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI blocked; Sprint 58 merges should not land without CI.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 Vercel Pro billing — ~9 days until trial expires. Payment method needed at vercel.com/account/billing.
SPRINT 58 STATUS: 0% — DeFiLlama Live API (Screener V3), Email Drip via Resend, Referral Backend all queued but no commits landed.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Verify + fix rate limiting. EOD-v2's code inspection contradicts standup-v4's resolution claim. Before Sprint 58 can launch live data infrastructure (DeFiLlama Screener V3), we need certainty on API protection. Assign: Programmer — read the actual route files, implement checkRateLimit if missing, confirm with a grep. This is a 20-minute task that resolves a Sprint 38 carry-over and is prerequisite for live data reliability at scale.

PRIORITY 2 — Fix build error + publish queue. The 'use client' + metadata conflict pattern has been fixed 3× in prior sprints (copy-paste fix, ~15 min). Fixing it enables: ecosystem/courses 78 routes, BTC reserve + tokenized-treasuries publish (both queued and QA-ready), and clears path for Sprint 58 merges. Immediately after fix: trigger publish for the 2 queued pages and redeploy.

PRIORITY 3 — Start Sprint 58: DeFiLlama live data wire-up for Bloomberg Screener V3. With the site approaching its first GSC organic signals (Day 15), Screener V3 is the highest-credibility tool on site currently running mock TVL/APY/Volume. Live llama.fi data transforms it from a prototype to a genuine product. Rate limiting + fallback must be confirmed first (Priority 1), then: Data Engineer (pipeline) → Programmer (Screener V3 wire-up) → QA → Deploy. This is the Sprint 58 centerpiece.
